alignmentGoal: Plan a SummaryDashboard-level high-fidelity alignment pass using existing captured source evidence and existing reverse runtime surfaces.

alignmentTargets.sourceObservation: The source SummaryDashboard is a narrow mobile surface with dense vertical stacking, compact section spacing, and dark card surfaces.
alignmentTargets.currentRuntimeRisk: Metric typography cannot be fully judged outside page density and rhythm.
alignmentTargets.plannedNextStep: Capture runtime baseline screenshots for SummaryDashboard semantic composition before any further CSS execution.

alignmentTargets.sourceObservation: Activity metrics use a dominant value and subordinate supporting unit or label roles.
alignmentTargets.currentRuntimeRisk: Cycle 44 judged metric pressure acceptable with evidence limits, but screenshot-level parity is not proven.
alignmentTargets.plannedNextStep: Compare runtime MetricCard and SummaryDashboard screenshots against the source screenshot before further metric CSS work.

alignmentTargets.sourceObservation: Workouts appear as compact repeated records inside the SummaryDashboard vertical stack.
alignmentTargets.currentRuntimeRisk: WorkoutItem is optional-supported but not source-alignment reviewed at the page rhythm level.
alignmentTargets.plannedNextStep: Include optional workouts module in the runtime baseline capture.

alignmentTargets.target: Trend and Award optional semantic module placement
alignmentTargets.sourceObservation: Trends and Awards are visible lower sections in the captured SummaryDashboard source surface.
alignmentTargets.currentRuntimeRisk: TrendCard and AwardBadge are runtime-composed but not source-alignment reviewed in full page flow.
alignmentTargets.plannedNextStep: Include FullSemanticLoop runtime surface in screenshot baseline review.

alignmentTargets.sourceObservation: Bottom navigation is visible in the source evidence as app shell.
alignmentTargets.currentRuntimeRisk: Adding BottomNav would expand scope beyond current SummaryDashboard transferable pattern.
alignmentTargets.plannedNextStep: Keep BottomNav deferred during SummaryDashboard alignment planning.

recommendedNextCycle.name: SummaryDashboard Runtime Visual Baseline Capture
recommendedNextCycle.purpose: Capture local runtime screenshots for SummaryDashboard and MetricCard alignment review before writing more CSS.

notes: This cycle plans visual alignment only.
No new Figma nodes are read and no new screenshots are generated.
High-fidelity alignment remains reverse runtime evidence, not design-system promotion.
